key_points.one_liner: P1c — honest stretch into higher-ed advising. JD 'What You Will Need' lists higher-ed student-services experience OR related advising/counse
key_points.our_fit_analysis: P1c — honest stretch into higher-ed advising. JD 'What You Will Need' lists higher-ed student-services experience OR related advising/counseling/mentoring (K-12/non-profits OK), Bachelor's, MS Office, equity commitment, communication. Jamie's TRUE bridge: BA Psychology & Education Studies (Wesleyan) incl. Practicum in Education Studies + Educational Psychology coursework; MS Applied Org Psych; InGenius educational programs (600+ participants, needs assessments, guides/sample plans, records across 20+ programs); cross-cultural rapport; data/records fluency. She does NOT have formal academic-advising-office experience or DegreeWorks/Banner — cover is explicitly candid about this and frames the transferable foundation. No fabrication: no claim of 1:1 academic advising she lacks.
key_points.sponsorship_signal: Cap-exempt public university. JD contains NO 'no sponsorship' / 'must be authorized without sponsorship' / ITAR / citizenship-required language. EEO employer, 'fair chance' employer — background check does not automatically disqualify. Sponsorship-safe for Jamie.
key_points.source_note: no full JD captured; key points composed from our record fields (jd_source=none).
